description: CER / Conditioned Suppression (Estes & Skinner, 1941): operant baseline (VI60s) in phase 1, CS-US pairing in phase 2, baseline reinstatement in phase 3 to measure suppression by reference schedule. Three-phase ABA-style composed procedure.
input:
@cs(label="tone", duration=60s, modality="auditory")
@us(label="shock", intensity="0.5mA", delivery="unsignaled")

phase baseline:
  sessions = 10
  VI60s

phase pairing:
  sessions = 5
  Pair.ForwardDelay(tone, shock, isi=60s, cs_duration=60s)

phase test:
  sessions = 3
  use baseline
_note: Suppression ratio computation is an analysis-pass concern. The DSL represents the procedure structurally; response rates during CS vs. baseline are derived from the recorded session data.
